meaning: 巴士拉[伊拉克东南部港市]
examples: That old moan by W.C. Fields, the American funny man, echoes the more recent feelings of many a resident in Basra.
But Basra still has a long way to go.
Iraq's prime minister has given gunmen in Basra three days to hand over their weapons.
At the outskirts of Basra, Iraq's second-largest city, coalition forces skirmished with Iraqi troops.
